event_info: 131.9kph; hint of outswing; Salt drives hard through point to get off the mark
130.3kph; short of length shaping down leg; Kohli flicks and misses
127.7kph; back of a length; nudged to square leg and Kohli opens his account with a single
first boundary! 137.1kph; Auqib Dar offers width outside off. Quick hands from Salt who stands tall and slashes it to the right of backward point
131.7kph; short of length just outside off; punched to sweeper cover

edge and four! 132.6kph; fuller than a good length; curls away a bit and Kohli gets forward to push at it. The outside edge goes well wide of the diving slip fielder. Short third man dives to his left but it is well out of his reach
132.8kph; pats this length ball to cover does Kohli and keeps the strike
135kph; length ball just outside off with a slip in place; Kohli pushes with the swing to sweeper cover
136.4kph; Mukesh hurls fuller and gets it to swing away late. Salt stays leg-side of the ball to drive and gets beaten on the outside edge
135.9kph; Mukesh pulls his length back; offers width as well; cut to deep point
shot! 132.9kph; Virat Kohli walks down the pitch; leans across; lifts his back leg and elegantly plays an aerial drive over wide mid-off. Hits with the swing and times it sweetly
137.3kph; Mukesh pulls his length back and bowls it wide. The ball further moves away; Kohli slashes and misses. Wided as it's outside the tramline
back of a length; Kohli hops and drops it in front of backward point with soft hands for a quick single
134.2kph; holds a bit does this short of length ball and Salt taps it to cover with an angled blade
fuller than a length; Kohli drives away from his body and inside-edges to square leg
back of a length; Salt stands tall; waits and slaps the cut to the right of backward point. Tristan Stubbs sprints to his left and mops it up
very full on off; Salt squeezes it to mid-off
1 run; inswinger; the line is too straight; Salt flicks and misses. The ball hits the pad and rolls to square leg
short outside off; Kohli pulls towards square leg off the inner part of the bat
135.6kph; yorker; middle-stump line; jammed to mid-off for a quick single

in the air and just out of Ngidi's reach! 137.4kph; hard length from Mukesh; the ball comes slower than the batter expects. Hits Salt high on the bat as he swings across the line. Ngidi moves to his right and dives but the ball falls short and wide of him
137.7kph; on a length and around off; chopped to point
138.9kph; cross-seamer; low full toss; Salt crouches and drives to mid-off

there's the aggressive shot from Kohli. He advances down the pitch; moves leg-side in the process and that allows him to free his arms. It's a length ball on the stumps and Kohli keeps his shape to flay it over cover
136.6kph; back of a length delivery outside off; Kohli cuts well but straight to Nissanka at point
139.7kph; width on offer again and Mukesh once again gets away as Kohli chops it to backward point
short of length delivery outside off. Salt stays leg-side; stands tall and flashes hard to slap it over backward point. The ball has the legs to reach the fence
135kph; Auqib responds with a yorker and that's been jammed down to long-on
119.5kph; on a length and Kohli punches to mid-on for a quick single
115.5kph; slow; full and in the slot; Salt picks it early and dispatches. Big backlift; gets under it and smokes it over long-on as he swings through the line
115.2kph; another slower delivery; Salt cuts hard and Axar makes a sharp stop to his left. A needless direct-hit results in an overthrow
133.2kph; low full toss; Salt shuffles across a bit and drills it straight of mid-off. Fifty up for RCB in the fifth over

ball_event: out Caught by Pathum Nissanka!! Ngidi strikes first ball! 132.5kph
event_info: scrambled seam delivery on a length outside off; Kohli shimmies down the track to try and go over the infield. Gets the placement wrong and picks out Nissanka at deep cover. Replay shows that it came off the bottom part of the bat. Virat Kohli c Pathum Nissanka b Lungi Ngidi 19(13) [4s-3]
back of a length delivery; punched to deep backward point
132.6kph; in-slanter; Salt opens the bat-face to guide it between backward point and short third man. Kuldeep runs back from short third man to keep the batters down to two
135.6kph; back of a length outside off; Salt slashes and misses. Cross-seamer and it bounced more
132.3kph; walks across and heaves across the line. Auqib Nabi dives to his right at midwicket and gets fingertips on it. Deep midwicket runs across to his left and does well to prevent the boundary
another good stop in the deep! Width on offer; Salt nicely cuts backward of square on the off-side. Nissanka dives full length to his left in the deep to save two more
over the wicket; googly on the stumps; Padikkal flicks through midwicket off the back foot
84kph; slow through the air; on a length and around off; Salt push-drives to long-off
Padikkal shimmies down the pitch and gets into a bit of a tangle as the length isn't full enough. Adjusts well and chops it to backward point
85.8kph; fraction short and it's wide outside off; Salt cuts to sweeper cover off the back foot
stump-to-stump line; Padikkal punches to long-off off the back foot
to sweeper cover; 85.9kph; Kuldeep lets out a grunt as he bowls a non-turner outside off; cut to sweeper cover
over the wicket; full and outside off; Salt crouches and cuts well into the gap behind square on the off-side. Natarajan welcomed with a boundary
Natarajan pulls his length back. Salt looks to pull and gets an under-edge that hits the deck and bounces over the bowler
high and handsome! Fuller than a length; Padikkal walks forward and swings through the line to loft it over long-off for a 79m six
133.3kph; Natarajan responds with an in-angling yorker. The line is just down leg; Padikkal moves across and is late on the flick. Misses and KL Rahul does well to pouch it
slower ball bouncer; too short and well outside off; ignored by Padikkal
135kph; fuller ball; Padikkal miscues the lofted drive. Goes over the bowler's head and falls well short of the long-off fielder
132.8kph; very full from Natarajan and Salt bunts it to long-on
89.6kph; length ball around middle; turned to midwicket off the back foot. Kuldeep runs to the ball but fails to pick it up cleanly and that allows the batters to come back for the second
Kuldeep overpitches outside off and Salt latches onto it. Good swing of the willow to pump it over long-off. Second fifty this season for Salt and he raises his bat
full delivery; driven along the ground to long-off
1 run; drifting down leg; Padikkal is late on the flick and the ball rolls to short fine leg off the pad
hangs back to a fairly full ball and works it into the leg-side
Kuldeep has his hands on head! Leggie outside off; Padikkal moves back and across to cut and misses. Beaten on the outside edge
round the wicket; flat ball on a length; worked into the midwicket pocket. Salt eyes the second; Padikkal sends him back
short of length; Padikkal moves leg-side to pull hard. Doesn't quite middle it and takes two as the ball goes between deep midwicket and long-on

streaky four! Padikkal comes down the track premeditatively and is beaten in the flight. Looks to drive away from his body; it's the away-drifter as well. The outside-edge saves him as it comfortably beats the keeper to his left
knocks this flat length ball down to long-on
knocked towards midwicket for a single

ball_event: out Caught by David Miller!! In the air and taken! Axar Patel gets a wicket in his first over. Full and quick on the stumps
event_info: Devdutt Padikkal gets low to bludgeon it over long-on. Perhaps could have hit it squarer. More height than distance. Miller barely has to move as to grab that at long-on. Devdutt Padikkal c David Miller b Axar Patel 18(13) [4s-1 6s-1]
way too short and Salt has so much time to rock on the back foot and put it away. Head still and powers the pull way into the mid-wicket stands. The crowd enjoyed that
wrong'un outside off; Philip Salt looks to cut and misses
another play and a miss; Salt makes room to cut and misses. The ball sneaks past the outside edge

ball_event: out Caught by Tristan Stubbs!! Brilliant bowling from Kuldeep Yadav. He kept it away from Salt after the short delivery off the first ball. This one turns away and makes it hard for Salt to time it. He had to reach out for the ball and flat-bats it towards long-off. Stubbs the fielder
event_info: runs forward and takes a good catch as it was hit flat. Delhi have got two wickets in back-to-back overs. Phil Salt c Tristan Stubbs b Kuldeep Yadav 63(38) [4s-4 6s-3]
Tim David starts with a short delivery outside off; David goes on the back foot and slaps it wide of backward point. No chance of stopping that
slider on off; punched down to long-off
cutter from Ngidi. David checks his shot and the ball drops just in front of cover

phew! This was hit with some power. It hardly had elevation off the ground. David picks the slower delivery and flat bats it straight back over the bowler's head. Hits the sightscreen on the full. 1000 IPL runs for Tim David
good length delivery outside off; defended to the off-side
attempted yorker from Ngidi. David squeezes it out to long-on
another yorker length delivery from Ngidi. Patidar stands tall and knocks it down to long-on
drilled through covers. David beats the fielder by the barest of margins. Was full and wide enough to be driven. David clears his front foot and drives it wide of cover. Raced away for four more
banged in short at the ribs; Patidar tucks it to vacant mid-wicket for a single
short again from Mukesh. This time at the badge; David takes his eyes off as he plays the pull. Manages to get bat on ball down to short fine
Patidar is quick to pick the length. Sees it short and latches onto it in a flash. Gets on top of the bounce and middles the pull to deep mid-wicket. It sounded crisp off the bat
slower short delivery well over the batter; wide called

ball_event: out Caught by Rahul!! Edged and gone. Pin drop silence in the stadium as RCB skipper departs. Mukesh dishes in a full delivery wide of off. Rajat Patidar goes after it with no feet. Gets a thick edge that flies to the right of KLR
event_info: who takes a good low catch. Rajat Patidar c Rahul b Mukesh Kumar 8(4) [6s-1]
Mukesh nails the yorker first ball to Jitesh; who keeps it out
anothet bounces that's well above the batter; wide called
beaten on the outside edge. Jitesh Sharma throws the kitchen sink at the fullish length delivery wide of off and misses by a long way
poor ball from Axar. Short and is wide of off. David stands and slaps it wide of sweeper cover. Was hit so hard that fielder in the deep was nowhere in the frame
pushed down to long-off
slower through the air on off and middle; blocked to cover
angled in from round the wicket. Jitesh Sharma turns it to the right of Axar
touch shorter on middle; Jitesh quickly jumps on the back foot and pulls it to deep mid-wicket
touch shorter outside off; David goes on the back foot and cuts it to sweeper cover
slower short delivery on middle; but the speedometer shows 137.7ks. David mistimes the pull to mid-wicket. One bounce to the fielder
slower ball into the deck; Jitesh backs away to flat-bat and miscues it to long-off
yorker outside off; David fails to get bat down in time. He had his bat face open; which made it hard to connect the ball
slower short delivery on middle; Tim David ducks under. Wide called

1 run; another slower short delivery that shows 136.8ks on the radar. Pulled along the ground to deep mid-wicket. Tim David reviews for the shoulder high no-ball as the umpire had already signalled twice. Replays show it was above the shoulder and the review is successful. Free-hit coming up
banged in short just below the shoulder. Jitesh Sharma miscues the pull wide of the keeper
wide yorker from Mukesh. David squeezes it out to deep point
just short of a yorker on off; driven straight to cover. End of a good spell from Mukesh : 4-0-32-1
darted into the right-hander; David heaves it to deep mid-wicket. Denies the single

ball_event: out Caught by Natarajan!! What a big wicket this is. He deined the single and loses his wicket in the next ball. Brilliant bowling from Axar. Slows it up and bowls it wide for David to reach out. He can't get close to the ball
event_info: only manages to get a leading edge that lobs to short third man. Natarajan takes a simple catch and Axar has the last laugh. Tim David c Natarajan b Axar Patel 26(17) [4s-3 6s-1]
arm-ball on middle; pushed to cover
punched off the back foot to sweeper cover
flatter and on the pads; Jitesh jumps on back foot and pulls it to deep mid-wicket
quicker delivery on middle; defended back to Axar
slider on off; pushed to cover
googly on off; Jitesh Sharma whips it to deep mid-wicket

ball_event: out Lbw!! Romario Shepherd walks even before the decision came up on the big screen. It was a poor shot and even poorer review. He decides to sweep the full delivery. Was in no position to do so
event_info: misses and is pinged in front of middle. Replays shows no bat involved and the ball would have smashes into middle. RCB lose a review along with Romario. Romario Shepherd lbw b Kuldeep Yadav 1(4)
Krunal Pandya dabs it down to short third man for a single
touch short outside off; cut to sweeper cover
bowled outside the tramline; wide called
single to finish the over. Cuts to sweeper cover. End of an excellent 17th over. Just 5 coming off it and a big wicket of Romario
slower full delivery on middle; tucked to deep mid-wicket

this goes down as a chance. Mukesh reacted late; he could have got to the ball with two hands. Decides to dive to his left and stick his left hand out; but can't take it. This was a slower short delivery outside off; Jitesh gets a thick edge that fies to the left of Mukesh
very full and on middle; driven down to long-on
Ngidi comes round the wicket and bowls a slower full delivery on middle; bunted down to long-on
short on middle; Jitesh pulls it along the ground. Just a single
Krunal picks the slower delivery and hits it straight down the ground. He waited for the ball and ensured he gave it a full monty. Goes through the line and hits it over the sightscreen
attempted yorker ends up as a low full toss. Driven down to long-off
Krunal walks across his stumps early. Natarajan sees it and banges in a slower short delivery. Krunal misses the scoop
full and outside off; Krunal backs away and misses by a long way
this is top class bowling from Natarajan. Dishes in a slower short delivery outside off; Krunal tires to pull it hard; can't get anywhere close to the ball. Hat-trick of dots for Natarajan
pinpoint yorker on off; Krunal gets a thick inside edge to the on-side

what a splendid over from Natarajan. Bowls a wide yorker outside off; Jitesh tries to guide it wide of the keeper and misses. DC take a review for caught behind; UltraEdge shows no spike. Just two runs coming off Natarajan's over
yorker on off; driven down to long-off
another yorker from Ngidi. Jitesh knocks it down to long-off

out Krunal Pandya Run Out!! Krunal is clearly not happy with his partner. He was forced to run for a wide delivery. This was banged in short down the leg; Krunal Pandya misses the pull and is called a wide. Jitesh ran for the bye; but Krunal wasn't aware of it. He is well short of the crease as the keeper throws it to Ngidi; who takes the bails off at the bowler's end. Krunal Pandya run out (Rahul/Lungi Ngidi) 12(10) [6s-1]
yorker on middle; Jitesh can't put it away. Gets an inside edge onto the pad and rolls to the off-side

ball_event: out Caught by David Miller!! Now Jitesh perishes. He never got going today. Tries to get under the ball
event_info: a low full toss; and hit it over long-off. Only manages to toe it to Miller; who takes a simple catch. Jitesh Sharma c David Miller b Lungi Ngidi 14(20) [4s-1]
full delivery outside off; driven down to long-off. The duo steal a second
yorker outside off; Bhuvneshwar jams it out to long-off. Just 6-runs coming off the last over and RCB end up with 175
outswinger; full in length; Nissanka drives away from his body. Gets a thick outside edge which takes it towards square third man
off-stump line; gentle outswinger on a good length; Rahul defends watchfully from the crease
129.9kph; another outswinger; this line is outside off; Rahul gets forward to push/drive and inside-edges towards mid-on for a quick single

ball_event: out Lbw!! Big shout for lbw
event_info: the umpire shakes his head in denial. Bhuvi wants a review and Rajat Patidar has reviewed it. Sharp nip-backer from Bhuvneshwar; Nissanka doesn't account for the movement as he shuffles to work it into the leg-side. Beaten comprehensively on the inside edge. Over to ball-tracking and it's three reds (hitting top of middle). Successful review. Credit to Bhuvneshwar for not only bowling a wonderful in-seamer after the outswingers but also forcing the captain to review it. RCB have the early breakthrough. Pathum Nissanka lbw b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 1(2)
128.6kph; gentle outswinger; Karun pats it to cover
133.7kph; inswinger; middle-stump line; Nair defends down the pitch. Excellent first over from Bhuvneshwar

Rahul greets Josh Hazlewood with a six! Wow. Fuller than a length wide of off; Rahul sees that coming. Clears his front leg even before the ball is delivered. Solid base and swings hard to hit it stylishly over extra cover. Goes all the way
Hazlewood pulls his length back and Rahul taps it to cover for a quick single

Karun opens his account with a boundary. Short of length outside off; Karun stays back to punch. Opens the bat-face in the process and sends it behind square on the off-side. No chance for the man in the deep to stop that
similar ball and Karun stays back to force it to deep backward point
typical Hazlewood line and length. Short of a good length ball just outside off; Rahul taps it to point
short of a good length ball angling in; tucked away to deep square leg

in the air and almost a wicket! Rahul slashes at this wide-ish short of length ball. Kohli; at shortish backward point; times his jump well but only manages to get fingertips on it. Palms it towards deep backward point

ball_event: out Caught by Phil Salt!! Second wicket for Bhuvneshwar Kumar! Salt catches
event_info: looks back towards the crowd and roars. He's making it a habit - taking excellent catches in the deep. Karun walks out of the crease and slashes at this short of a good length ball outside off. The ball flies off the outer half of the bat and Salt sprints to his left at deep backward point. Puts in a slide and tumbles to make a tough catch look easy. Karun Nair c Phil Salt b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 5(5) [4s-1]
two slips (1st and 3rd) in place. On a length and around off; defended into the off-side

131.7kph; fraction short; punched through the covers. Salt sprints to his right from deep backward point; slides and flicks the ball to the converging fielder to save a couple of runs. Excellent effort

ball_event: out Caught by Jitesh Sharma!! Edged and gone! 134.8kph
event_info: decent bounce on a good length outside off; Sameer Rizvi walks forward to force it through the off-side. Gets a thick outside edge on it and Jitesh Sharma dives full length to his right to a superb one-handed catch. RCB are cock-a-hoop. After two match-winning knocks; Rizvi has flopped thrice in a row. Bhuvi on fire as DC lose their third wicket in the third over. Sameer Rizvi c Jitesh Sharma b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 2(3)
wide of the crease; Bhuvneshwar serves width as well. Stubbs stands tall and opens the bat-face to punch it through the covers. Beautifully timed and Stubbs opens his account with a good shot
Rasikh starts with a wide. Short of length but errs with his line - down leg
full delivery; Rahul presses forward and belts it over mid-off. No movement for Rasikh as he attempts the inswinger
133.4kph; short ball and Rahul pulls to deep backward square leg
short of a good length ball on the stumps; defended to the right of the bowler
fullish ball way down leg; Jitesh Sharma has to dive to stop it
138.2kph; fuller than a good length; Stubbs drives to point
136kph; length ball attacking the stumps; Stubbs knocks it to long-on
low full toss on the pads; flicked to deep backward square leg
stylish shot! Fullish delivery; Rahul walks across and brings his wrists into play to whip it over deep square leg. He's middled it. Second six for KL; both against Hazlewood
fuller ball attacking the stumps; defended back to the bowler
back of a length with width on offer; Rahul gets on his tippy toes and cuts fiercely behind square on the off-side

another four! Hazlewood shortens his length; Rahul sees it coming. Arches back and uses the bowler's pace and bounce to his advantage as he periscopes it over the short third man fielder. The plan seems to be go after Hazlewood for Rahul
142kph; Hazlewood slips in a yorker and Rahul digs it out to backward point
another one in the blockhole; a backing away Rahul brings his bat down hurriedly to jam it towards point
slow; full and on leg; Stubbs clips it to backward square leg
very full; Rahul drives hard but straight to mid-on
134.6kph; pitched up delivery; Rahul drives along the ground to long-off

full ball angling in towards leg; clipped away through midwicket. Salt sprints to his left in the deep; puts in a dive and does a superb job to flick it back into play. Saves two more. He's been fantastic today
in-slanter; no room on offer and Stubbs jabs it to midwicket
110.3kph; slower ball; full and outside off; Stubbs waits and drives hard to long-on
round the wicket; full delivery on the stumps; Stubbs moves leg-side and leans forward to drive along the ground to long-off
82.2kph; flighted delivery; full and outside off; Rahul leans across to slap-drive it to sweeper cover
95.6kph; quicker; flatter and on a length; punched to long-off
off-stump line; Rahul rocks back to cut it to deep point
width on offer; Stubbs cuts hard off the back foot and Dar makes a tumbling stop to his left in the deep
in-drifter; full on the stumps; Stubbs gets forward to push it defensively to cover. Just 6 runs off Krunal's opening over
99.4kph; a drag down first up; Rahul rocks back to pull it to long-on's right
another one on the shorter side; Rahul doesn't miss out on this occasion. The right-hander goes on the back foot and wristily pulls it between long-on and deep midwicket. The placement is spot-on

2 runs; Rahul comes down the track premeditattively and gets beaten in the flight. It's a slower googly and Rahul gets deceived. Gets into a tangle; the ball spins past the inside edge; brushes the pad and rolls to third man. Hazlewood does well to pull it back in
cracking shot off the back foot! Not too short. Rahul treks back and punches straight down the ground. Generates a lot of power despite being on the back foot
flicks through midwicket
90.3kph; short of length; pulled to deep square leg. 14 runs off Suyash's opening over who struggled with his lengths
flat ball on the stumps; Stubbs knocks it back to the bowler who parries it towards the midwicket region
flat good length on off; KL Rahul goes on the back foot and punches it nicely but straight to the fielder at sweeper cover
slower and good length on middle; Tristan Stubbs waits and gets forward to drive to long-off
full outside off; slower and KL Rahul comes down the track and waits before driving to sweeper cover
flat good length and on middle; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-off
pushed through quicker on middle; KL Rahul gets forward and doesn't get it off the middle as he lofts; straight down the ground; David runs across and cuts it off from long-on to his left. Just one
flat and shortish on middle and leg; KL Rahul goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep backward square-leg. Kohli keeps it to one
flat good length and outside the leg-stump; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and tucks it to long-on
the googly and it turns in; outside the leg-stump; KL Rahul backs away and punches it wide of sweeper cover; easy two and it's 50 for Rahul. He raises the bat. Once again he is hurting RCB

down leg; full and KL Rahul gets low; sweeps well; behind square on the leg-side; rolled his wrists; wide of both short fine and deep backward square-leg. Runs away for four. Suyash Sharma wears a disappointed look

flat good length just outside off; KL Rahul goes on the back foot and punches it wide of the dive of extra-cover; to his left; Venkatesh Iyer runs across and cuts it off with a dive to his right at sweeper cover. Saves two
the googly and on middle; KL Rahul goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep mid-wicket; Tristan Stubbs is not interested for the 2nd. Jordan Cox the sub does well to keep it to one

ball_event: out Caught by Virat Kohli!! Look at Kohli's reaction. He is absolutely pumped. Anushka Sharma in the RCB camp is thrilled. She claps in delight. KL Rahul was looking so solid and was set to take his side to another win here at the Chinnaswamy but Kohli has put an end to that. He comes down the track and looks to loft this tossed up delivery
event_info: but it hits the bottom of the bat. Still he would've got away; but Kohli runs and then as the ball dips on him; he stretches his two hands and takes it at long-off. Then gets up and celebrates. Krunal Pandya is pumped as well. The crowd love it. Is that the wicket which wins the game for RCB? Rahul c Virat Kohli b Krunal Pandya 57(34) [4s-6 6s-2]

the bouncer outside off; and Axar Patel cleverly opens the face of the bat and glides it over short third man. Hetmyer got out to a similar delivery earlier in the season against the same bowler. Not this time
flat back of a length on off; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and punches to the right of mid-wicket

slower and outside the leg-stump; Axar Patel backs away; punches; the spin on the ball beats Suyash to his right at short third man; he was going the other way and the ball spins away; he fumbles and gives away two. Patidar still claps in encouragement for that effort
good length on middle; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and nudges it down to long-on

tossed up full just outside the leg-stump; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and drives it to the left of Krunal Pandya who dives and cuts off the single. He is not happy with something as he flicks the ball away. I have another look and he is yelling at Suyash with a come on - clearly not happy with the leggie for misfielding earlier in the over
full outside off; Axar Patel shuffles across and flicks it through square-leg for one s
short of length on middle; tight delivery; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and turns it to mid-wicket
short of length and on middle-stump; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it down the ground for one
Jitesh Sharma does a good job to save one. RCB review successfully. Full and down leg; Axar Patel flicks and misses; it brushes the trouser and Jitesh knew it; and the technology proves him right
short of length outside off; width; Axar Patel cashes in. He goes on the back foot and cuts it hard and wide of backward point; no chance for deep backward point to his left. That was timed so well
short of length on leg-stump; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and closes the face of the bat to turn it to the square-leg area

FOUR; Rasikh Salam Dar has overstepped. And what's worse it's four as well. A length delivery outside off; Axar Patel glides late as he opens the face of the bat and just about gets it wide of the dive of Jitesh Sharma to his left. Runs away fine and now a free-hit coming up for him
full and in the slot; around off; Axar Patel gets forward to loft; loses his shape and miscues it. Caught at mid-off by David. But since the ball was in the air for such a long time; they run two
slower-ball and on middle-stump; Axar Patel closes the face of the bat and turns it to the vacant mid-wicket area
short of length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and pulls hard and wide of long-on; but it's just one
very full and angling into the left-hander from round the wicket; Axar Patel jams the drive and mistimes it to the vacant cover-point area
floaty slower-ball and full outside off; in the slot; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and drills it so hard; past the right leg of Rasikh Salam Dar; even before he could react; too straight for long-off
another slower-ball and full outside off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to drive; wide of cover; and wide of long-off; they take an easy two
the googly outside off; but short; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and cuts straight to the fielder at sweeper cover
the orthodox leg-break and flat just outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and makes room to punch with a high elbow to extra-cover; straight to the fielder
short and wide outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and cuts wide of sweeper cover; Romario runs and dives to his right to cut it off; saves two
poor delivery and put away. A short delivery and Tristan Stubbs has smashed it flat-batted straight down the ground for four. Went back and hit it so hard; and gives no-one a chance
bit more flight. On a length just outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it straight to the fielder at cover
tossed up full outside off; turns away; the leg-break; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and pushes with the turn wide of cover
flat good length outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches it to sweeper cover. Was quicker and skidded on
round-arm and from 24 yards; flat length on off; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and punches it to sweeper cover
slower and tossed up full outside the leg-stump; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive to long-on
again round-arm and from around 24 yards; Axar Patel is happy to get forward and nudge it down to long-on
drifts into the pads; length and Tristan Stubbs gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket. Just one more
another round-arm delivery; full and outside the leg-stump; Axar Patel misses out. He sweeps and mistimes it straight to the fielder at short fine. Either side and it would've been four
short of length just outside off; Tristan Stubbs goes on the back foot and punches with a high elbow to long-off
back of a length outside off; Axar Patel looks to dab late and misses; goes over the outside-edge. Bhuvi gestures for long-off to come in and short third man to go back. There was extra bounce there
short of length on middle; Axar Patel goes on the back foot and closes the face of the bat to flick to deep square-leg
short of length on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and punches with a high-elbow; but just one to long-off
Bhuvneshwar Kumar follows Axar Patel who has shuffled across well outside off; with a fullish delivery; Axar scoops and gets it wide of short fine. Just one as deep backward square-leg comes around

full on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to drive to the right of Bhuvneshwar Kumar; who stretches his right hand out; fails to stop and the ball flicks the back of David Miller and then they take one as the ball goes away towards short cover

good inswinging yorker and following Tristan Stubbs outside the leg-stump; according to the ump; he got something on it as he digs it out; it rolls in front of Jitesh Sharma and they take a quick single

low full-toss on middle and off and driven to the left of Patidar at cover. David Miller was way out with a direct-hit. He had given up. The ball was struck too well for the batter's liking. Patidar had more time than he thought; shies and misses. How big will that be come the end of the game?
short of length and splice-jarring length; hurries Tristan Stubbs on the pull; he goes on the back foot and mistimes it to deep mid-wicket; wants two but it's just one
superb yorker length delivery on off; David Miller gets forward to drive to long-on and it's just one
full and inside the tramline outside off; Tristan Stubbs reaches for it to drive; misses; under the bat and not far from the inside-edge. A dot and Jitesh Sharma applauds that delivery
superb inswinging yorker on the toes of Tristan Stubbs. He can only dig it out. Two dots in a row and just 14 runs from the last 3 overs
right up there on the stumps; full; David Miller gets forward to drive to long-off
good yorker length delivery on the stumps; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to dig it out to long-on
David Miller backs away outside the leg-stump; it's a low full-toss there; flicked straight to the fielder at deep square-leg and it's just three from three off this over

Bhuvneshwar Kumar tries to change it up and gets mashed. It's short outside off; Tristan Stubbs latches on; goes on the back foot and pulls high and handsomely over deep square-leg. First boundary after 24 balls. Bhuvneshwar grimaces as he knows that he erred there

low full-toss on leg-stump; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and flicks; splits deep square-leg and deep mid-wicket. Cox the sub cuts it off with a dive at deep mid-wicket. 50 for Stubbs. The DC camp are up to applaud
Tristan Stubbs backs away outside the leg-stump; Bhuvneshwar Kumar keeps it simple; full and right up there on the stumps; Stubbs drives to long-off and retains the strike with that run
poor delivery and four. Low full-toss down leg; easy with short fine inside. He gets forward and flicks it well wide of the man. Runs away to the short boundary
full on off; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and lofts; doesn't time it; just one to long-off
full and just outside the leg-stump; David Miller can't get under that; gets forward and drills it wide of David at long-off. But he gets across and cuts it off
right up there; on middle and leg; Tristan Stubbs gets forward to flick and it's not timed; so rolls slowly in front of deep mid-wicket. They run hard and come back for the 2nd
full on middle; Tristan Stubbs gets forward and lofts; more off the thick inside half; but just one to long-on
yorker length and outside off; David Miller can't get under that; he gets forward to drive to long-off. Good comeback after the first-ball four
1 run; David Miller has missed out. Length delivery and outside the leg-stump; Miller heaves and misses; rapped on the pads but impact outside the leg-stump. That had to be sent to the stands
full and right up there on middle; Tristan Stubbs clears his front leg and flicks; but straight to the fielder at deep mid-wicket. Just one and the crowd are going RCB in full flow

that's a juicy low full-toss on middle; can't bowl such stuff. David Miller stays back; heaves and it's nearly into the top-tier at deep mid-wicket. Went 87m. He missed out the first ball of the over; not this time

David Miller you beaut! That's what he can do. Full and wide outside off; he stays back and goes over extra-cover. The lofted drive and Tristan Stubbs is pumped. He fist-pumps his right hand and Romario Shepherd grimaces. To generate such elevation to that; needs special timing and Miller provided that

David Miller does it for DC. It's another gift. A low full-toss on the pads; Miller gets forward and flicks well; races away to the deep mid-wicket fence which is vacant. That went to the fence in a flash. DC break RCB hearts at the Chinnaswamy. As soon as the ball found the fence; Stubbs punched the air and let out a come on David Miller before going to his team-mate to greet him
